name: Sports Sponsorship Intake
description: Sports sponsorship intake for athletes, teams, sports organizations, and sponsors structuring a sponsorship arrangement. Evaluates the sponsorship opportunity, the brand alignment, the deliverables, the exclusivity, the compensation, and the performance and conduct provisions to produce a sports sponsorship intake profile with arrangement assessment and negotiation priorities. Not legal advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
